name: Ciprofloxacin
description: I-Fluoroquinolone i-antibiotic kunye nokhuseleko olubanzi lwegram-negative. Isetyenziselwa ukusuleleka kwizilonda ezinobungozi, ukungena kwintlungu yesisu (i-GI flora coverage), kunye nosulelo lwe-urinary tract. I-PO ekhoyo kunye ne-IV.
contraindications: Abantwana kunye nolutsha olukwiminyaka eyi-18 (isihlobo -- umngcipheko we-tendinopathy)
warnings: Umngcipheko wokuqhekeka kwe-tendon, ngakumbi i-tendon ye-Achilles. Yeka ukuba intlungu ye-tendon ikhula.
Inokwandisa ixesha le-QT -- isilumkiso kunye namanye amachiza okwandisa i-QT.
Kuphephe ukukhulelwa ukuba ezinye iindlela zikhona.

pediatric.dose: 10-20 mg / kg IV q8-12h (max 400 mg / idosi). PO: 10-20 mg / kg q12h (max 750 mg / umthamo).
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa kuphela xa iinzuzo zodlula umngcipheko we-tendinopathy. Ugcino usulelo olumandundu.

obstetric.note: Kuphephe ukukhulelwa ukuba ezinye iindlela zikhona. Sebenzisa kuphela usulelo olubeka ubomi esichengeni apho inzuzo yodlula umngcipheko.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Infectious Disease
